bugs.title: SpecRegistry.parseItemTagKey triggers BuiltInRegistries bootstrap, causing 'Not bootstrapped' in 1.20.1 test runtime
bugs.evidence: TagKey.create(Registries.ITEM, loc) at line 78 forces BuiltInRegistries.<clinit> to run. In the 1.20.1 test environment the registries are not bootstrapped before SpecRegistryTest, so any call path through parseItemTagKey (e.g. bindRoleTag) throws a 'Not bootstrapped' error at runtime. This was masked by compile failures before wave 3.
bugs.expected: SpecRegistryTest should pass on 1.20.1 without requiring MC Bootstrap.
bugs.suggested_fix: Either (a) lazy-resolve the Registries.ITEM reference into a companion-object property only touched post-bootstrap, or (b) accept TagKey<Item> directly in bindRoleTag and move string parsing to call sites that are guaranteed to run post-bootstrap. Will block wave 4 1.20.1 test execution.

bugs.title: PlayerAttackMixin @At target uses hardcoded DamageSource descriptor with no per-version fork
bugs.evidence: The @At target descriptor 'Lnet/minecraft/world/damagesource/DamageSource;F' is a single string with no stonecutter/preprocessor fork. If any of the 5 subprojects uses a mapping set where the intermediary name differs, the mixin will silently fail to inject at runtime without a compile error. No static evidence of breakage was found, but the absence of a version fork here is inconsistent with the defensive forking applied elsewhere.
bugs.expected: Mixin injection succeeds in all 5 environments OR a version-conditional descriptor fork is in place.
bugs.suggested_fix: Run a targeted mixin injection test across all 5 subprojects, or add a stonecutter fork on the target descriptor if decompilation reveals a descriptor change between versions.
